name: Grilled or Broiled Zuchinni
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, dry, and halve the zucchini lengthwise.
2. Arrange the zucchini in a single layer on a greased broiler pan or hinged grill.
3. Score the zucchini diagonally.
4. Melt the butter and add lemon-pepper seasoning and garlic salt.
5. Brush the mixture onto the cut side of the zucchini.
6. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Broil for 8 minutes or grill until tender and the cheese is browned. No need to turn.
